subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from this Exile, Who hath severed Himself from all who are in the heavens and on the earth, and hath turned unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من هذا المهاجر الذی انقطع عن کل من فی السموات و الارضین و توجه الی
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
